# ADV Digital Marketing

> ADV Digital Marketing is a performance marketing agency in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, founded by Alvin Yap. It builds and operates full marketing infrastructure for B2B and SME clients — Meta (Facebook & Instagram) advertising, Google Ads, SEO with Answer Engine Optimisation (AEO) and Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO), and AI-powered marketing automation using Claude, Make.com, and Notion.

Key facts:
- Founded and led by Alvin Yap, based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
- Serves Malaysian SMEs and regional brands across B2B services, property, education, e-commerce, F&B, healthcare, and professional services
- One of the first agencies in Malaysia offering AEO (optimisation for ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini citations) and GEO (optimisation for Google AI Overviews)
- Builds AI automation systems: AI content brief generation, automated reporting, CRM workflows

## Pages

- [Home](https://advmarketing.biz/): Agency overview, services, results, and FAQ
- [About](https://advmarketing.biz/about): Who ADV Digital Marketing is, founder Alvin Yap, and how the agency works
- [Meta Ads Agency Malaysia](https://advmarketing.biz/meta-ads-agency-malaysia): Facebook & Instagram advertising services, budgets, and FAQ
- [Google Ads Agency Malaysia](https://advmarketing.biz/google-ads-agency-malaysia): Google Search, Performance Max, Display & YouTube campaign services
- [SEO Agency Kuala Lumpur](https://advmarketing.biz/seo-agency-kuala-lumpur): SEO, AEO & GEO services — including definitions of Answer Engine Optimisation and Generative Engine Optimisation
- [AI Marketing Automation Malaysia](https://advmarketing.biz/ai-marketing-automation-malaysia): Claude + Make.com + Notion automation systems for marketing teams
- [Malaysia Digital Marketing Statistics 2026](https://advmarketing.biz/malaysia-digital-marketing-statistics-2026): 68 verified, sourced statistics on Malaysian ad spend, social media, e-commerce, and AI adoption
